description: Perform an environmental hotspot analysis for natural gas electricity generation using the USLCI database (~/LCA_Imports/uslci_database.zip) and LCIA methods (~/LCA_Imports/lcia_methods.zip). Identify the top contributing processes to Global Warming Potential (GWP) for a product system based on 'electricity, natural gas, at power plant' using the TRACI 2.1 method. Export the contribution table to ~/LCA_Results/hotspot_report.csv and create a summary text file at ~/LCA_Results/hotspot_summary.txt listing the top 5 contributing processes and their approximate percentage shares.
